title: Chronicle S3: seed digest at cycle start (newCycleRun) + inject into scout/triage prompts at enforce
summary: Wire the S2 digest: in core/cyclerun.go newCycleRun (after workspace MkdirAll/archivePollutedWorkspace) resolve the chronicle policy stage ONCE; at shadow AND enforce collect inputs (last-N dossiers by allocated cycle number, failedApproaches already in hand from ReadState, chronicle.BuildIndex) and WriteDigest into the run workspace - BEST-EFFORT: digest failure logs WARN and never blocks the cycle. At enforce additionally set Context["recent_outcomes"] = the capped content (single resolution point - hooks never re-read policy). phases/scout/scout.go:51 and phases/triage/triage.go:61 ComposePrompt emit the block when the context key is non-empty, positioned AFTER the stable prompt prefix (cache-friendly; where carryover_summary/fleet_scope already inject). Stage semantics: off=nothing; shadow=file seeded only (observable, zero prompt change); enforce=file + prompt inline. Compiled default shadow (ReportSizeGate rollout precedent); the shadow->enforce default flip is a later one-line follow-up after one observed batch.
acceptance: RED: TestComposePrompt_NoDigestContextKeyIsByteIdentical (regression pin: absent key => byte-identical legacy prompt)
